label: Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives

node.label: Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives
node.definition: Predicted value is matched to reward plus discounted future value; it operationally connects Reinforcement learning and Dynamical systems & control theory.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives is modeled as depending on Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.
examples: atlas downstream link to Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Reinforcement learning, Dynamical systems & control theory.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives has a `uses` dependency on Reinforcement learning because Reinforcement learning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Bellman, temporal-difference & value objectives has a `uses` dependency on Dynamical systems & control theory because Dynamical systems & control theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
